title: I have display issues with two Heltec V3

messages.author: SpectralGM
messages.text: I’m experiencing something similar with my v4 with screen. Did you try flashing the 1.11 firmware? That stabilized my screen issues.
messages.content_html: I’m experiencing something similar with my v4 with screen. Did you try flashing the 1.11 firmware? That stabilized my screen issues.

messages.author: SteveSgt
messages.text: Yes. I saw here that 1.11 worked for someone else. I did erase and install 1.11 at one point, but it didn’t help me. Someone on FB said that the Heltec V3 displays are notoriously unreliable. (edited)
messages.content_html: Yes. I saw here that 1.11 worked for someone else. I did erase and install 1.11 at one point, but it didn’t help me. Someone on FB said that the Heltec V3 displays are notoriously unreliable. (edited)
messages.reactions_html: 1
messages.reply_html:
SpectralGM
I’m experiencing something similar with my v4 with screen. Did you try flashing the 1.11 firmware? That stabilized my screen issues.
